input.title: Context View: Context breadcrumbs do not work
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

```
- a1
  - a2
    - a3
      - m
        - x
- b1
  - b2
    - b3
      - m
        - y
```

1. Set the cursor on `a1/a2/a3/m`.
2. Activate Context View.
3. Click on the ContextBreadcrumbs link `b2`.

## Current Behavior

Nothing happens.

## Expected Behavior

Should navigate on click.

## Testing

RTL test
